languages.text: "It is an honour to meet with you personally, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "It is an honour to meet with you personally, Lord Captain!"
"It is an honour to meet with you personally, Lord Captain!"
{n}As you turn away, you hear stifled laughter and snorts of derision behind you. But it would be much worse if you accepted the challenge — and lost.{/n}
"It is an honour to meet with you personally, Lord Captain!"
"It is an honour to meet with you personally, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: {n}背を向けると、後ろから笑いがこらえきれずに、嘲笑の鼻息が聞こえる。しかし、挑戦を受け入れて負けたら、もっとひどいことになるだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you turn away, you hear stifled laughter and snorts of derision behind you. But it would be much worse if you accepted the challenge — and lost.{/n}

languages.text: "Sizinle şahsen tanışmak bir onurdu Lord Kaptan!"
languages.original_text: "It is an honour to meet with you personally, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Sizinle şahsen tanışmak bir onurdu Lord Kaptan!"

languages.text: “能见到您本人，真是荣幸，舰长大人！”
languages.original_text: "It is an honour to meet with you personally, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: “能见到您本人，真是荣幸，舰长大人！”

languages.text: "Es ist eine Ehre, Euch persönlich zu treffen, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "It is an honour to meet with you personally, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Es ist eine Ehre, Euch persönlich zu treffen, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: « C'était un honneur de vous rencontrer en personne, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »
languages.original_text: "It is an honour to meet with you personally, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: « C'était un honneur de vous rencontrer en personne, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »

languages.text: «¡Es un honor conocerl{mf|e|a} personalmente, Lord Capitán!».
